name: 9ct 100mm Christmas Shatterproof Ornament Set White Iridescent - Wondershop™
description:
Give your Christmas tree a festive refresh with this 9-Count 100MM Tree Ornament Set from Wondershop™. This plastic ornament set features nine ball ornaments in an iridescent white finish for a unique look. Each ornament has a silver-tone cap with a coordinating top loop for easy hanging, and the shatterproof construction makes them ideal for homes with pets or young kids.

Welcome to the Wondershop™.
